project_metadata.name: Commitly
project_metadata.type: Single File SPA (Vanilla HTML, CSS, JS)
project_metadata.vibe: Precision instrument, terminal-evolved, premium technical tool

rules: Overlines, pills, and UI labels must be uppercase, Space Mono, tracking 0.1em
Numbers in stats, heatmaps, and pomodoro timer MUST use Space Mono
Use CSS Variables strictly for all colors.
Light theme is default. Apply [data-theme='dark'] attribute on <html> or <body> for dark mode.
Accent primary is Vermilion (#FF4F00) — high energy, creates a beautiful streak/fire motif, contrasts beautifully with stark white and obsidian black.
Generous padding inside surface containers. Use --space-6 or --space-8 for stat cards.
Any container with a border MUST have internal padding.

icons.usage: Use Phosphor Icons (e.g., ). No emojis as icons.

stat_cards.style: Sharp 0px border-radius, 1px solid var(--border-color), background var(--bg-surface).
stat_cards.typography: Label in muted uppercase Space Mono, Value in bold Bricolage Grotesque.

heatmap.style: Square cells, 2px border-radius (sharper than GitHub). Gap 4px between cells.
heatmap.colors: Bind cell background to var(--heatmap-X) based on contribution level.

task_item.style: Flex row, items-center, 1px solid var(--border-color), background var(--bg-surface). Zero border-radius.
task_item.states: Hover: border-color becomes var(--accent-primary). Completed: opacity 50%, text-decoration line-through on title.
task_item.swipe_gesture: Reveal danger red background with trash icon on left swipe (mobile touch handling).
task_item.drag_handle: Grid of 6 dots icon (ph-dots-six-vertical), cursor-grab, opacity 0.5.

subtasks.style: Indented by 2rem, left border 2px solid var(--border-color) to indicate nesting.

pomodoro_timer.style: Inline per-task. Space Mono font for the countdown. Glowing Vermilion border when active.

tabs_and_pills.style: Tabs: Unselected = transparent bg, muted text. Selected = var(--bg-surface), var(--accent-primary) bottom border 2px, main text color.
tabs_and_pills.pills: Fully rounded (9999px), 1px border, padding-x 12px, padding-y 4px, small Space Mono.

achievements_badges.style: Geometric shapes (hexagons, diamonds) drawn with CSS clip-path or simple SVG inline. High contrast stroke var(--accent-primary), dark background.

progress_bar.style: Height 4px, background var(--border-color). Fill is var(--accent-primary) with transition: width 0.5s ease-out.

layout_guidance.container: Max-width 800px margin auto. The app should feel like a focused, centralized column even on ultra-wide screens.
layout_guidance.header: Sticky top, backdrop-filter blur(12px), background var(--bg-surface) with 80% opacity, 1px bottom border. Include Theme toggle icon here.
layout_guidance.settings_drawer: Fixed right or bottom depending on mobile/desktop. Slide in transform. Z-index 50. Blur backdrop.

micro_interactions.hover: Slight lift (transform: translateY(-2px)) on stat cards. Subtle background shift on buttons.
micro_interactions.list_transitions: When task is completed, delay removal (if filtered) by 300ms so user sees the strikethrough state.

tech_stack_rules.html_structure: Must be exactly ONE file. <style> in <head>, HTML body, <script> at end of <body>.

testing_rules.requirements: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, tabs, modal triggers, and form submissions MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid="task-complete-checkbox").
